name: pm-skills
description: 12 PM knowledge codices covering the full PM lifecycle: analysis (Competitive & Market Analysis, Discovery & Research, Problem Framing), definition (Specification Writing, Metric Design & Experimentation), strategy (Product Strategy, Go-to-Market Strategy, Pricing & Packaging), communication (Executive Writing, Narrative Building, Multi-Channel Publishing), and influence (Stakeholder Alignment). Each encodes 1000-1300 lines of scoring rubrics, decision tables, evidence standards, and failure modes.
